flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Stetson University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.3k vs 2.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Stetson University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8k → 2.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stetson University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.8k → $57.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Stetson University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.8k → $57.4k).
